prompt: A frustrated media buyer (Sam — 30s man with dark hair, glasses, rolled-up sleeves) sits at a desk surrounded by four different monitors. Each screen shows a completely different dashboard design — one dark-themed with pie charts, one bright with bar graphs, one spreadsheet-heavy, one with a clunky form interface. Tangled cables between the monitors. Post-it notes everywhere. A coffee cup sits precariously close to the edge. Late afternoon light through office windows. His expression says 'there has to be a better way.' Show the chaos of managing campaigns across incompatible platforms.

Sam types a campaign brief on his laptop. The brief text glows with teal energy and radiates outward as three clean rays of light, each reaching a different seller agent robot. The robots stand at podiums labeled with subtle icons — a TV (CTV), a monitor (display), and headphones (audio). Each robot leans forward with interest, examining the incoming brief. The rays are standardized — same width, same format — emphasizing that one brief reaches all three. Clean, hopeful energy replacing the chaos of the previous scene.

Three seller robots present their proposals back to Sam. The CTV robot holds up a video slate with play button. The display robot presents a banner layout. The audio robot offers a waveform with companion image. Sam sits at his desk reviewing all three on a single clean screen — the proposals are displayed side by side in matching card formats, with comparable pricing and metrics visible. Sam looks pleased and engaged, leaning forward. The visual contrast: three different media types, but one unified view. The mess from scene 1 is gone.

Creative format templates and actual ad assets snap together like puzzle pieces. A wide video frame snaps onto a video ad. A square banner template connects with display creative. An audio waveform with companion banner clicks into place. A small helper robot assists, checking each connection. Some pieces have green checkmarks (matched). One piece has a yellow gap indicator (the missing audio cut). Clean, satisfying visual of things fitting together perfectly. Bright, organized workspace. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Creative format templates snap together like puzzle pieces — video, display, and audio assets click into place with green checkmarks, while a helper robot checks each connection

prompt: Sam (30s man with dark hair, glasses) presses a glowing teal launch button on his desk. Above him, a holographic campaign blueprint materializes in the air — it shows three branches radiating from a central campaign node, each ending at a seller robot who receives the allocation. The whole scene has an air of confidence and precision — one button, three platforms, everything connected. Sam's expression is focused and determined. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam presses a glowing teal launch button and a holographic campaign blueprint materializes above — three branches radiate to seller robots, each receiving their allocation

prompt: The holographic campaign blueprint from the previous scene passes through a security checkpoint. A governance robot with a shield emblem stands at the checkpoint, scanning each branch of the campaign. Three inspection panels float nearby showing checkmarks: budget (green check with dollar sign), brand safety (green check with shield), targeting compliance (green check with map pin). The guardian robot stamps the campaign with an approval seal. A human supervisor stands behind, nodding with arms crossed. Professional, secure, trustworthy atmosphere.

Sam leans back comfortably at his desk — relaxed posture, slight smile, hands behind head. His single monitor shows a clean, unified dashboard with rising bar charts (teal colored), converging line graphs, and performance metrics from all three sellers merged into one view. In the background, three small seller robots send data streams (thin teal lines) that converge into the dashboard. The contrast with scene 1 is stark: one screen, one view, no chaos. Late afternoon golden light, calm productive energy.
